problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene may resolve Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
